expectations.text: checks active model, blocks on Haiku
expectations.evidence: No model check — would proceed on any model.

expectations.text: asks user which model to use for exploration
expectations.evidence: Would not ask; would launch into exploration immediately on whatever model is active.

expectations.text: enters a stance of curious thinking partner
expectations.evidence: Without the stance defined, would default to task-completion mode — likely jump to solutions rather than exploring options.
Without the explicit 'never write code' guardrail, would likely implement the suggested fix directly when asked about a problem.

expectations.text: opens multiple interesting directions for user to follow
expectations.evidence: Would converge on a single recommendation rather than opening multiple threads.

expectations.text: may read and search codebase for context
expectations.evidence: Reading and searching the codebase is natural behavior regardless of skill.
